pages.raw_text:
CHICAGO, Aug. 26.-"Sweep the
country"


Managers of the national pro-
hibition campaign say this Is the
year they will actually turn the
trick. Certainly the blue ribboners
are working this time to win.


The organization is now more
perfected than at any time in the
history of prohibition. There is
an aggressive national organiza-
ton. There are state organizations,
county organizations and, this
year, even ward organizations in
every city, and precinct organiza-
tons in every ward.


E. w. Chain, presidential nomi-
nee. is a whirlwind fighter. He
is prohibition candidate of a new
type.


He has a superb physique, is IS
years old, and is capable of turn
ing handspring. Chain claims he
can make more speeches than Bry-
an without breaking down. He is
now in the West talking to big
crowds.
